hero.title: Markdown Editor
hero.description: Write Markdown, preview the rendered result, and export reusable documents directly in your browser.

flow.title: Write → Preview → Export
steps: Copy or download the finished document

differences.title: Keep source writing and rendered output connected
differences.description: Markdown Editor combines a focused source editor, immediate preview, and practical export actions.

items.title: Write
items.description: Type or paste Markdown into a full-height editor.

items.title: Preview
items.description: Review the safely rendered document while writing.

items.title: Export
items.description: Copy source or HTML and download reusable files.

feel.title: A direct path from Markdown source to finished document
feel.description: The workspace keeps writing, document statistics, preview, and export actions visible together.

items.title: Start quickly
items.description: Use the starter document or paste existing Markdown.

items.title: Review immediately
items.description: See the preview and statistics update as content changes.

items.title: Use the result
items.description: Copy Markdown or HTML and download both document formats.

audiences.title: Who uses Markdown Editor
audiences.description: Useful for people creating documentation, notes, README files, and structured text.

items.title: Developers
items.description: Write and export README files and technical content.

items.title: Technical writers
items.description: Review rendered documentation while refining the source.

items.title: Students and creators
items.description: Build structured notes and content without saved history.

resourceSection.title: Markdown editing essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed for a focused browser-only writing workflow.

items.title: Document statistics
items.description: Track characters, words, and lines in realtime.

items.title: Browser exports
items.description: Download Markdown and HTML files without a server.

groupedSection.title: Write and export structured content
groupedSection.description: Keep the source document and rendered result together.

items.name: Markdown source
items.description: Type, paste, clear, or reset the editable document.

items.name: Copy content
items.description: Copy raw Markdown or rendered HTML.

items.name: Download files
items.description: Export the finished document as Markdown or HTML.

technicalSection.title: Designed for private browser editing
technicalSection.description: Markdown Editor follows the shared Ansiversa client-side utility architecture.
items: Safe browser-only Markdown rendering with no saved history.
